text.title: ICP Fit Scorecard Output Contract
text.summary: JSON Schema draft-07 for a scorecard bundle (rows + histogram + remove_list) plus valid/invalid examples.

example.note: version not semver, signal values exceed maxima, total exceeds 100, band inconsistent with total, evidence empty, histogram.median exceeds 100.

forbidden.pattern: row.total != pain_match + budget_fit + urgency + product_fit + accessibility.
row.band='remove' AND no entry in remove_list (no-act run).
Any signal in evidence empty or under 5 chars (unevidenced score).

allowed-transformations.transformation: Round signal scores to nearest integer; band derived from rounded total.
Anonymise customer_id (hash) when publishing histogram externally.
